series_metadata.series_title: Level of Care (LOC) Program Policy and Development Files
series_metadata.series_description: Rule, policy and program development files for system reform effort, regarding Phase I Short-term and Phase II long-term care services. To include, policy drafts, amendments, published rules, policy development documentation, proposed funding and grant applications, documented changes to the program, periodic program evaluation required by CMS.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 5 years then destroy. Review by State Archives prior to disposition. ; Paper: Retain in office 1 years and then image. Review by State Archives prior to disposition., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
